items.title: This Tesla owner won $10k in court for Tesla's FSD lies (Updated)
items.summary: For over a decade now, Tesla has sold a promise of vehicles that can drive themselves, even stating that every car it produced had all the hardware for self-driving . But after years of the company being unable to deliver, some owners want...

items.title: DuckDuckGo's 'No AI' Search Traffic Climbs as Users Reject Google's AI Overhaul
items.summary: Privacy-focused search engine DuckDuckGo has seen a surge in demand for its "No AI" search option in the wake of Google's May 19th I/O announcements . Google debuted a new "intelligent" search box reimagined with AI . It features AI...

items.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI - and that could come back to bite them
items.summary: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.

items.title: Apple spotlights Detroit app makers as local Developer Academy marks fifth graduating class
items.summary: Apple today marked the fifth graduating class from its Detroit Developer Academy with a new feature highlighting local app makers who have used the program over the years to build apps, businesses, and community projects. Here are the...

items.title: Blink and Kempower expand US East Coast EV fast charging
items.summary: Kempower and Blink Charging are expanding their EV fast-charging partnership across the US East Coast, with 14 new charging sites planned through 2026.

items.title: Kuo: Apple's iPhone camera roadmap includes a costly upgrade
items.summary: Analyst Ming-Chi Kuo is out with a new look at Apple's upcoming iPhone camera plans, including an under-the-hood ultra-wide module change and a surprisingly steep cost increase. Here are the details.

items.title: Nvidia and Microsoft tease "a new era of PC" ahead of Computex 2026 - coordinated social media posts could indicate that rumored N1X laptops will be Windows on Arm systems
items.summary: An Nvidia-powered Arm PC running Windows could inspire new local AI experiences beyond Copilot+.

items.title: Monitoring Dementia Patients in Care Facilities Using Beacons
items.summary: A study was published recently in JMIR mHealth and uHealth. Researchers evaluated a monitoring method that integrated wrist-worn accelerometers with ankle-worn Bluetooth beacons to track individuals with dementia in a long-term residential...
